question: Who received the battle plan from you?
answer:
As a captain in the area, I had access to the battle plan. I received my own copy, as it was customary in the Iraqi Army for all lieutenants and captains to get a copy of the plan for advancing or retreating. 

I took my copy to Sulaymaniyah to send it to those who were planning on the other side with the Kurdish fighters.
